Application Hub

Send applications, share your landing page, and manage client outreach.

Your Landing Page
Send a credit application to your client via email. Covers equipment leasing, merchant cash advance, working capital, and general financing. Your referral tracking is included automatically.
Professional MCA marketing piece branded with your contact info and trackable application link.
Professional vendor equipment leasing overview with your contact information. Share with potential vendors and partners interested in offering financing. Inquiries come back to your Vendor Outreach pipeline.
Register a vendor or equipment supplier you work with. After submitting, you'll have the option to send the vendor application form directly to your contact. Alliance will then review and process the vendor for approval.
Insurance Brokers One-Pager

Professional one-pager for insurance brokers explaining how they can earn referral fees by connecting their commercial clients with Alliance financing solutions.

Accountants & CFOs One-Pager

Professional one-pager for accountants and CFOs showing how they can help their business clients access financing while earning referral fees.

Alliance Overview

Comprehensive Alliance Financing Group overview branded with your contact information. Share with prospects and partners.

Mortgage Brokers & Agents One-Pager

Professional one-pager for mortgage brokers and agents showing how they can expand their practice with commercial financing referrals and earn additional revenue.

Mortgage Partnership Presentation

Full 6-page partnership presentation for mortgage brokers and agents. Covers the opportunity, partner portal, AI lender matching, revenue model, and next steps — branded with your contact info.

Vendor Equipment Leasing Program

Professional vendor equipment leasing program overview with your contact information. Share with potential vendors and partners interested in offering financing to their customers.

Information & Quoting Tools

Resources to help you sell more effectively

Capital Lease Payment Estimator

$10 purchase option at end of term  |  First payment in advance  |  All payments before tax

Payment Estimates
Term Monthly Weekly Daily Cost of Financing
$10 Purchase Option at End of Term

* Estimates only. Subject to final credit approval, completed documentation, equipment verification, and lender terms. Payments shown before applicable taxes.

Email a lease application to your client with this payment estimate attached

📊 Capital Lease Rate Card — CR4 Tier 1 INTERNAL ONLY

Estimated annual rates by equipment cost bracket. Terms: 24–60 months. $10 purchase option. First payment in advance.

Used Equipment
All types
New Equipment
$75K+ discount

* Rates shown include Alliance arrangement fee. Subject to final credit approval. New equipment discount applies at $75K+. For operating lease quotes with residual value, request a special bid.

🚀

Operating Lease Quotes — Coming Soon

Preview

Custom operating lease pricing per asset type with flexible structures — including promotional rates, deferred payment programs, and vendor-subsidized financing. Built in partnership with equipment manufacturers.

In the meantime, request an operating lease quote through the Request Quote page and Alliance will revert with custom pricing based on the asset and residual value.

📋 Equipment Leasing Programs

Standard Lease
$5,000 – $500,000 | 24–72 months | All credit profiles
Quick Approval (Under $75K)
App-only up to $75K | Same-day decisions | Minimal documentation
$1 Buyout Lease
Own the equipment at end of term | Best for long-term assets
Fair Market Value (FMV) Lease
Lower payments | Option to upgrade, return, or purchase at end of term

🔥 Current Promotions

90-Day Deferred Payment
Customers don't pay for the first 90 days. Available on all new leases over $10,000 through Q2 2026.
Seasonal Step-Up Payments
Start with lower payments that increase over time. Ideal for seasonal businesses or new equipment ramp-up.
Quick Close Bonus
Deals funded within 5 business days of approval receive preferred rates. Contact Alliance for details.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

What credit scores qualify?

We work with all credit profiles. A-credit customers get the best rates, but we have programs for B and C credit as well. Startups with limited history can also qualify with additional documentation.

How fast is approval?

Deals under $75K are typically app-only and can be approved same-day. Larger deals may require financial statements and usually take 2–5 business days.

What documentation is needed?

Under $75K: Completed application only. Over $75K: Application plus 3 months bank statements and 2 years tax returns or financial statements.

Can my customer get pre-approved?

Yes. Send the application early — customers can get a pre-approval so they know their budget before selecting equipment. Pre-approvals are valid for 30 days.

How does the vendor get paid?

Once the lease is funded and equipment is delivered, the vendor receives full payment via wire or ACH within 1–2 business days. You get paid in full — the customer pays the lease over time.

🎓 Sales Tips & Training

💡 Lead with the Payment
Instead of quoting the full equipment price, show customers their monthly payment. "$500/mo" is easier to budget than "$25,000 upfront."
💡 Offer Financing Early
Don't wait until the customer hesitates on price. Mention financing options upfront as part of your proposal to remove the price objection before it comes up.
💡 Pre-Qualify Before the Quote
Send the application before your customer commits. A pre-approval gives them confidence and speeds up the close.
💡 Use the 90-Day Deferral
Our current promo lets customers start using equipment today with no payments for 90 days. This is a powerful closer for budget-conscious buyers.

Need help with a deal or have questions?
